## Summary

Describe the change and the user or developer problem it solves.

## Scope

- Backend:
- Frontend:
- Docs:

## Validation

Describe how you tested the change.

- [ ] Backend behavior verified
- [ ] Frontend behavior verified
- [ ] JSON contract checked
- [ ] Docs updated if needed

## Screenshots Or Payload Examples

If the change affects UI or contracts, include screenshots or sample request/response payloads.

## Checklist

- [ ] I kept the change focused
- [ ] I documented any new endpoint or workflow
- [ ] I called out any contract changes
- [ ] I avoided unrelated cleanup
